title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Luffy, Orochi, Yamato, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Hiyori as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His gambit was thwarted by a single slash!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who owns the blade that separated Crochi from his final cursed head?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why none other than Kozuki Oden's second disciple, Denjiro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With his last one detached and burning, the twisted Kurozumi was at long last brought to his knees!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and then a flash of lighting marked the fall of onigashima, and with it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The fall of the dragon king, Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Sun had finally pierced the dark clouds...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that were suffocating wano for 20 long years, the skies were cleared.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds from the ignorant masses celebrating the fire festival in the capital crept into their ears...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, suddenly, defying all reason... the burning remains of Orochi spoke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The Kurozumi family's grudge shall continue to curse this rotten land, generation after generation for all eternity..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Princess Hiyori refused to flinch or shudder. She held her gaze! The country's 20 years worth of torturious memories fueled her heart!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: "Stand back, it's too dangerous! Hiyori- Sama!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: cried the samural, denjiro! But she shook off her head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our beloved Princess Hiyori did not yield even one step...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Staring into Orochi's devilish face, she delivered a damning epitaph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her fan held aloft, the Kozuki crest proudly dancing on its edge...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No longer having to bite her tongue, like she did for the last 20 years, she cried out....!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Father! Mother! Brother! And our Homeland!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kurozumi means charcoal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hear this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the moment I've been waiting for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WOTO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now everyone, all together now!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: ...They were born to burn!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and now time slides ahead to the day after the festival!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Where feuds and weapons can finally rest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A shocking truth is revealed at the Port where the reversed crescent Moons met!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The denouement of this violent saga is a joyous reunion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The blood split in order to revive this clan will never be forgotten, a record of their sacrifices will always be carried by the wind!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: THAT CONCLUDES TODAY'S TALE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ON OUR NATION'S RENOWNED SAMURAL...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
